data.name: Filthy Apartments 💋
data.detailed_description:
It’s time for Jen to strike out on her own, and she’s found the perfect listing – a sophisticated lady named Paula has an apartment everyone says is worth its expensive price tag. Fully furnished, it’s out of Jen’s price range. But maybe if she plays her cards right at the showing, she can make a deal with sexy Paula.

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures of two sexy roommates

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Ultra HD 4K (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Futanari

• Girl's and Futa's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 18 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Jen really wanted the exclusive en suite apartment that sexy Paula had for rent. She’d do almost anything for it. Well scratch that, she really would do anything to live there! But would the more sophisticated and mature Paula be interested in the deal young Jen has to offer?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
